---
title: "Pmdf3_cox"
format: html
---

```{r}
#load relevant libraries 
library(survival)
install.packages("survminer")
library(survminer)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
# Check riluzole column in turkey_data
table(turkey_data$Riluzole_use_at_time_of_blooddraw, useNA = "always")

# Check how many survival IDs match turkey_data
cat("IDs matching:", sum(df_survival$id_wgs_df2 %in% turkey_data$id_wgs_df2), "\n")
cat("Total survival rows:", nrow(df_survival), "\n")
```


```{r}
names(df_survival)[1:5]
cat("Match via patient_id:", sum(df_survival$patient_id %in% turkey_data$patient_id), "\n")
cat("Match via id_wgs_df2:", sum(df_survival$id_wgs_df2 %in% turkey_data$id_wgs_df2), "\n")
cat("Match via IID:", sum(df_survival$IID %in% turkey_data$id_wgs_df2), "\n")
```

```{r}
# STEP 1: Prepare variables
df_survival <- read.csv("PMDF3_survival_cleaned.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

riluzole_pcs <- turkey_data %>%
  select(id_wgs_df2, Riluzole_use_at_time_of_blooddraw, PC1:PC20)

df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  left_join(riluzole_pcs, by = c("IID" = "id_wgs_df2")) %>%
  mutate(
    event          = ifelse(survival_status == "dead", 1, 0),
    survival_years = survival_months / 12,
    # Fix empty strings to NA then factor
    site_of_onset  = na_if(site_of_onset, ""),
    site_of_onset  = factor(site_of_onset,
                            levels = c("Spinal", "Bulbar", "Generalized")),
    sex_at_birth   = factor(sex_at_birth, levels = c("female", "male"))
  )

df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype <- factor(df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype,
                                        levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM"))

df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  mutate(
    metab_nonNM = factor(
      ifelse(Cyrius_phenotype != "NM", "nonNM", "NM"),
      levels = c("NM", "nonNM")
    ),
    metab_PMIM = factor(
      case_when(
        Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("PM", "IM") ~ "PM_IM",
        Cyrius_phenotype == "NM"            ~ "NM",
        TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
      ),
      levels = c("NM", "PM_IM")
    )
  )

# Confirm site_of_onset is correct
table(df_survival$site_of_onset, useNA = "always")
```


```{r}
# Survival time and event
cat("Survival time summary:\n")
summary(df_survival$survival_months)

cat("\nEvent values:\n")
table(df_survival$survival_status, useNA = "always")

cat("\nSite of onset:\n")
table(df_survival$site_of_onset, useNA = "always")

cat("\nC9orf72:\n")
table(df_survival$C9ORF72_Status_consensus, useNA = "always")

cat("\nCyrius phenotype:\n")
table(df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype, useNA = "always")

```

```{r}
# STEP 1: Prepare variables

df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  mutate(
    event          = ifelse(survival_status == "dead", 1, 0),
    survival_years = survival_months / 12,
    site_of_onset  = ifelse(site_of_onset == "" | is.na(site_of_onset),
                            NA, site_of_onset),
    site_of_onset  = factor(site_of_onset,
                            levels = c("Spinal", "Bulbar", "Generalized")),
    sex_at_birth   = factor(sex_at_birth, levels = c("female", "male"))
  )

df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype <- factor(df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype,
                                        levels = c("NM", "IM", "PM", "UM"))

df_survival <- df_survival %>%
  mutate(
    metab_nonNM = factor(
      ifelse(Cyrius_phenotype != "NM", "nonNM", "NM"),
      levels = c("NM", "nonNM")
    ),
    metab_PMIM = factor(
      case_when(
        Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("PM", "IM") ~ "PM_IM",
        Cyrius_phenotype == "NM"            ~ "NM",
        TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
      ),
      levels = c("NM", "PM_IM")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# STEP 2: Define covariates

pc_covariates <- paste0("PC", 1:5, collapse = " + ")
base_covars   <- "age_at_onset_years + sex_at_birth + site_of_onset"
all_covars    <- paste(base_covars, pc_covariates, sep = " + ")

# STEP 3: Check proportional hazards assumption

ph_test <- coxph(
  Surv(survival_years, event) ~ Cyrius_phenotype +
    age_at_onset_years + sex_at_birth + site_of_onset,
  data = df_survival
)
cat("Proportional hazards test:\n")
print(cox.zph(ph_test))

table(df_survival$site_of_onset, useNA = "always")
```
```{r}
# STEP 4: Run 5 primary Cox models (overall survival)

# Simpler standard Cox model - PH assumption holds
cox1 <- coxph(
  as.formula(paste("Surv(survival_years, event) ~ metab_nonNM +", all_covars)),
  data = df_survival %>% filter(!is.na(metab_nonNM))
)

cox2 <- coxph(
  as.formula(paste("Surv(survival_years, event) ~ metab_PMIM +", all_covars)),
  data = df_survival %>% filter(!is.na(metab_PMIM))
)

cox3 <- coxph(
  as.formula(paste("Surv(survival_years, event) ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data = df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM"))
)

cox4 <- coxph(
  as.formula(paste("Surv(survival_years, event) ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data = df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "PM"))
)

cox5 <- coxph(
  as.formula(paste("Surv(survival_years, event) ~ Cyrius_phenotype +", all_covars)),
  data = df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "UM"))
)

cat("M1 converged:", cox1$iter < 25, "\n")
cat("M2 converged:", cox2$iter < 25, "\n")
cat("M3 converged:", cox3$iter < 25, "\n")
cat("M4 converged:", cox4$iter < 25, "\n")
cat("M5 converged:", cox5$iter < 25, "\n")
```
```{r}
# Extract results

extract_hr <- function(model, term, label) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  if (!term %in% rownames(coef_table)) {
    return(data.frame(comparison = label, HR = NA, CI_low = NA,
                      CI_high = NA, p_value = NA))
  }
  est  <- coef_table[term, "coef"]
  se   <- coef_table[term, "se(coef)"]
  pval <- coef_table[term, "Pr(>|z|)"]
  data.frame(
    comparison = label,
    HR         = round(exp(est), 2),
    CI_low     = round(exp(est - 1.96 * se), 2),
    CI_high    = round(exp(est + 1.96 * se), 2),
    p_value    = round(pval, 4)
  )
}

survival_results <- rbind(
  extract_hr(cox1, "metab_nonNMnonNM",   "Any non-NM vs NM"),
  extract_hr(cox2, "metab_PMIMPM_IM",    "PM + IM vs NM"),
  extract_hr(cox3, "Cyrius_phenotypeIM", "IM vs NM"),
  extract_hr(cox4, "Cyrius_phenotypePM", "PM vs NM"),
  extract_hr(cox5, "Cyrius_phenotypeUM", "UM vs NM")
)

survival_results$FDR_adjusted_p <- round(
  p.adjust(survival_results$p_value, method = "BH"), 4)

cat("=============================================================\n")
cat("OVERALL SURVIVAL RESULTS\n")
cat("=============================================================\n")
print(survival_results)
```

```{r}
# PLOT 1: Forest plot - overall survival results
tabletext <- cbind(
  c("Comparison",          "Any non-NM vs NM",   "PM + IM vs NM",
    "IM vs NM",            "PM vs NM",            "UM vs NM"),
  c("HR (95% CI)",         "1.99 (0.89, 4.45)",  "1.90 (0.81, 4.43)",
    "2.11 (0.87, 5.15)",   "1.21 (0.13, 11.10)", "4.44 (0.80, 24.51)"),
  c("FDR q-value",         "0.1672",              "0.1734",
    "0.1672",              "0.8661",              "0.1672")
)
 
mean_vals <- c(NA,   1.99,  1.90,  2.11,  1.21,  4.44)
low_vals  <- c(NA,   0.89,  0.81,  0.87,  0.13,  0.80)
high_vals <- c(NA,   4.45,  4.43,  5.15, 11.10, 24.51)
 
png("forestplot_survival_turkey.png", width = 2800, height = 1600, res = 300)
 
forestplot(
  labeltext   = tabletext,
  mean        = mean_vals,
  lower       = low_vals,
  upper       = high_vals,
  zero        = 1,
  xlog        = TRUE,
  col         = fpColors(box = "black", line = "black", zero = "grey50"),
  fn.ci_norm  = fpDrawDiamondCI,
  boxsize     = 0.25,
  lwd.zero    = 1.5,
  lwd.ci      = 1.5,
  ci.vertices = TRUE,
  txt_gp      = fpTxtGp(
    label = gpar(cex = 0.9),
    ticks = gpar(cex = 0.85),
    xlab  = gpar(cex = 0.9),
    title = gpar(cex = 1.1, fontface = "bold")
  ),
  xlab      = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)",
  title     = "CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype and ALS survival\nTurkey cohort — multivariable Cox regression",
  graph.pos = 2
)
 
dev.off()
cat("Saved: forestplot_survival_turkey.png\n")
```

```{r}
# PLOT 2: Kaplan-Meier curves by metaboliser phenotype
png("km_curve_overall.png", width = 1200, height = 800, res = 150)

plot(km_fit,
     col      = c("#2c3e50", "#2980b9", "#e74c3c", "#27ae60"),
     lty      = 1,
     lwd      = 2,
     xlab     = "Time (years)",
     ylab     = "Survival probability",
     main     = "Kaplan-Meier survival curves by CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype\nTurkey cohort — ALS cases",
     mark.time = TRUE,
     xlim     = c(0, 15),
     ylim     = c(0, 1))

legend("bottomleft",
       legend = c("NM - 360", "IM - 185", "PM - 19", "UM - 26"),
       col    = c("#2c3e50", "#2980b9", "#e74c3c", "#27ae60"),
       lty    = 1,
       lwd    = 2,
       title  = "Metaboliser phenotype",
       bty    = "n")

dev.off()
```

```{r}
cat("\nSurvival analysis sample sizes:\n")
cat("Any non-NM vs NM:", nrow(df_survival %>% filter(!is.na(metab_nonNM))), "\n")
cat("PM + IM vs NM:   ", nrow(df_survival %>% filter(!is.na(metab_PMIM))), "\n")
cat("IM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "IM"))), "\n")
cat("PM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "PM"))), "\n")
cat("UM vs NM:        ", nrow(df_survival %>% filter(Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("NM", "UM"))), "\n")

# Overall survival dataset
cat("Overall survival dataset (n=590):\n")
table(df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype, useNA = "always")

# Events per phenotype
cat("\nEvents (deaths) per phenotype:\n")
table(df_survival$Cyrius_phenotype, df_survival$event, useNA = "always")
```
```{r}
```
